loop1.title: Voltage Live Health
loop1.note: Showing live per-phase currents, unbalance, max spread, and neutral current; deviation % is derived from active power and rated kVA. The 'Rate Change' slot was replaced with 'Neutral Current' as the meter does not measure time-derivative rates.

loop1.title: Voltage History
loop1.note: Showing per-phase current history and max/spread stats — sag/swell event counts and rated reference lines are not measured for this asset.
